title: Glow Squid Origin
description: A Glow Squid origin for the Origins mod
body:
an origin i made for a lore server because i was bored and didnt like the options

## THE GLOW SQUID ORIGIN INCLUDES:
-A launch ability (to use just hold a piece of gunpowder and do use item keybind)

-Slow falling

-Storage via secondary keybind

-Glow squid particles

-Aqua affinity, Water vision, Underwater speed and you are short

# **MUST USE ORIGINS FORGE OR FABRIC WITH PEHKUI.**
